main.description: Standard Reader typography for a collections publication. Uses the same record key as the publication. Colors remain on the publication's site.standard.theme.basic record.

publication.description: AT URI of the site.standard.publication this theme applies to.

createdAt.description: When the theme record was first published.

updatedAt.description: When the theme record was last edited.

fonts.description: Google Font family names for collection title and body typography.
